title: supervision + restart intensity
manager: Supervision — `on_member_error: escalate | restart | retire` with restart-intensity windows — so failure becomes policy: a crashed member restarts from its factory coordinate, or the error escalates up the containment tree, bounded so a thrashing member can't restart-loop forever. This is Erlang-style let-it-crash for FSL systems: you declare how failure propagates and recovers instead of hoping nothing ever fails.
cs: `on_member_error: escalate|restart|retire` + restart-intensity windows (§22); restart from the factory coordinate (W7.25); escalation up the containment tree (W7.22).
